dataset.description:
A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query:
{
  "and" : [
    "GadmGid is HTI.6.2.3_1",
    "OccurrenceStatus is Present"
  ]
}
The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive:
41 records from NOAA Southeast Fisheries Science Center (SEFSC) Fisheries Log Book System (FLS) Commercial Pelagic Logbook Data
52 records from CM Herps Collection
84 records from Echinoderms of Hispaniola Island
117 records from Museum of Comparative Zoology, Harvard University
1 records from UF Invertebrate Zoology
101 records from EOD – eBird Observation Dataset
58 records from Tropicos Specimens Non-MO
26 records from USDA United States National Fungus Collections
19 records from Tropicos MO Specimen Data
244 records from KUBI Herpetology Collection
19 records from University of Vermont Zadock Thompson Zoological Collection-Invertebrates
1 records from AntWeb
4 records from Paleobiology Database
3 records from LACM Vertebrate Collection
1 records from University of South Florida Herbarium (USF)
26 records from Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew - Herbarium Specimens
14 records from Academy of Natural Sciences of Philadelphia Ornithology Collection
91 records from University of Florida Vertebrate Paleontology
2 records from The New York Botanical Garden Herbarium (NY)
1 records from University of Michigan Museum of Zoology, Division of Reptiles & Amphibians
127 records from NMNH Extant Specimen Records (USNM, US)
7 records from Malacology Collection at the Academy of Natural Sciences of Philadelphia
1 records from iNaturalist Research-grade Observations
5 records from SIO Benthic Invertebrate Collection
123 records from The fishes collection (IC) of the Muséum national d'Histoire naturelle (MNHN - Paris)
dataset.title: GBIF Occurrence Download 0038004-260519110011954
